# Paperclip Hub — full plugin index

> Generated from the registry. The canonical structured form is /plugins.json.

Generated: 2026-06-02T07:57:05.428Z
Total plugins: 52

Each entry below lists: name, npm package, category, install command, weekly downloads, version, capabilities, and source.

---

## Daytona Sandbox Provider

First-party sandbox provider plugin that provisions Daytona sandboxes as Paperclip execution environments.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/plugin-daytona
- npm: @paperclipai/plugin-daytona (v2026.529.0)
- Category: provider
- Weekly downloads: 2528
- Source: https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip
- Capabilities: environment.drivers.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @paperclipai/plugin-daytona

Sandbox provider plugin that provisions exe.dev VMs as Paperclip execution environments.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/plugin-exe-dev
- npm: @paperclipai/plugin-exe-dev (v2026.529.0)

- Weekly downloads: 2442
- Source: https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip

- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @paperclipai/plugin-exe-dev

## Agent Memory

Memory-as-Skill system for Paperclip agents. Persistent recall, observation, and search with token budget enforcement.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-agentmemory
- npm: @gaud_erp/paperclip-plugin-agentmemory (v0.6.0)
- Category: memory
- Weekly downloads: 1437
- Source: https://github.com/gauderp/paperclip-plugin-agentmemory

## Hindsight Memory

Persistent long-term memory for Paperclip agents. Automatically recalls relevant context before each run and retains agent output after — so every agent gets smarter over time.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/hindsight-paperclip
- npm: @vectorize-io/hindsight-paperclip (v0.2.3)
- Category: memory
- Weekly downloads: 266
- Source: https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight
- Capabilities: events.subscribe, agent.tools.register, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, agents.read, issues.read, issue.comments.read
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @vectorize-io/hindsight-paperclip

## Social Agent

LinkedIn agent + analytics for Paperclip. Connects LinkedIn accounts (OAuth, multi-account per company), lets agents post / react / comment on their behalf, and surfaces engager-level analytics — engagers classified by ICP and region, triage workflow, URL-paste tracking — on tracked posts.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/social-agent-plugin
- npm: @blaze283/social-agent-plugin (v0.7.3)
- Category: integration
- Weekly downloads: 45
- Capabilities: companies.read, activity.log.write, activity.read, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, database.namespace.migrate, database.namespace.read, database.namespace.write, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, agent.tools.register, jobs.schedule, api.routes.register, ui.page.register, ui.sidebar.register, instance.settings.register, issues.create, issues.read, issues.update, issue.comments.create, projects.read, agents.read

## anneal-memory

First-class four-layer memory for Paperclip agents: episodic store + continuity file + Hebbian associations + limbic affective tagging, with citation-validated graduation and tamper-evident audit chain. Wraps the anneal-memory Python MCP server.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/anneal-memory-paperclip-plugin
- npm: @anneal-memory/paperclip-plugin (v0.0.2)
- Category: memory
- Weekly downloads: 7
- Source: https://github.com/phillipclapham/anneal-memory-paperclip-plugin
- Capabilities: agent.tools.register, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, activity.log.write, events.subscribe
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @anneal-memory/paperclip-plugin

- Category: tools
- Weekly downloads: 6
- Capabilities: events.subscribe, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, ui.action.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install paperclip-plugin-notification-sound

## Smara Memory

Persistent memory for Paperclip agents with Temporal Memory Scoring™. Store facts, search by meaning, and recall context — recent and important memories surface first, stale ones fade naturally.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-memory
- npm: @smara/paperclip-plugin-memory (v0.1.1)
- Category: memory
- Weekly downloads: 6
- Source: https://github.com/smara-io/paperclip-plugin
- Capabilities: agent.tools.register, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, instance.settings.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @smara/paperclip-plugin-memory

## GitHub Issues Sync

Multi-binding GitHub issue sync — register N bindings (one per Paperclip company × repo) and the plugin polls each on a 10-minute schedule.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-github-issues
- npm: @wil0x91/paperclip-plugin-github-issues (v0.2.4)
- Category: integration
- Weekly downloads: 6
- Source: https://github.com/wil0x91/paperclip-plugin-github-issues
- Capabilities: issues.read, issues.create, issues.update, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, jobs.schedule, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, activity.log.write, companies.read, projects.read, instance.settings.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @wil0x91/paperclip-plugin-github-issues

## Linear

Two-way sync between Paperclip projects and a Linear workspace. Pick which Paperclip project links to which Linear project; new Paperclip issues push to the linked Linear project, Linear issues that carry a configured label are imported back so agents can pick them up.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-linear
- npm: @oldharlem/paperclip-plugin-linear (v0.7.0)
- Category: integration
- Weekly downloads: 0
- Source: https://github.com/Oldharlem/paperclip-linear-plugin
- Capabilities: companies.read, projects.read, issues.read, issues.create, issues.update, issues.wakeup, issue.comments.read, issue.comments.create, issue.documents.read, activity.log.write, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, events.subscribe, events.emit, jobs.schedule, webhooks.receive, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, agent.tools.register, instance.settings.register, ui.page.register, ui.dashboardWidget.register, ui.detailTab.register, ui.sidebar.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @oldharlem/paperclip-plugin-linear
